description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are primarily finished in a combination of white and light pink, with some sections in dark gray or black, adding visual contrast. The rear of the house includes a balcony and a wooden gate, while the side yards are landscaped with trees and grass. The overall structure is boxy and minimalist, reflecting contemporary architectural trends.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a mix of white, pink, and dark gray exterior finishes. Features include a covered entryway, landscaped front yard, and a rear balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white wall, a single door, and landscaped side yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wooden gate, balcony, and pink wall sections with windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark gray/black wall, small windows, and visible landscaping in the front yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a modern door, steps, and landscaped approach, flanked by a small porch and greenery.
